docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT JUICE NATURALLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JUICE NATURALLY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUICE NATURALLY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT JUICE NATURALLY
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25797, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUICE NATURALLY $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.00, UNDISPUTED THAT MONIES WERE DUE UNDER CONTRACT. DEF. FAILED TO PROVE ENTITLEMENT TO OFFSET CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
